summary: Brown Bread Watch feature fully tested and verified. All backend API tests passed (15/15). Frontend UI displays correctly with skull icon, risk emojis, grayscale photos, ages, and prices. Click-to-search integration works.
passed_tests: API: /api/brown-bread-watch returns 200 status
API: Response contains watch_list array
API: All celebrities have required fields (id, name, age, risk_level, price, image)
API: All celebrities in watch list are aged 60+
API: Risk levels are valid (critical/high/elevated/moderate)
API: Critical risk (90+) - Michael Caine (93), Judi Dench (92)
API: High risk (80-89) - Morgan Freeman (89), Ian McKellen (87), Al Pacino (86), Paul McCartney (84), Robert De Niro (83)
API: Watch list sorted by age descending
API: Seeded elderly celebrities present in watch list
API: All celebrities have image URLs
API: All celebrities have valid prices
API: All celebrities are living (not deceased)
API: Watch list celebrities can be searched via /api/celebrity/search
UI: Brown Bread Watch section visible in sidebar
UI: Skull icon present in header
UI: Title shows 'BROWN BREAD WATCH'
UI: Description shows 'Strategic picks for the +100 bonus 💀'
UI: 6 celebrities displayed in watch list
UI: Risk emojis displayed correctly (🔴 for critical, 🟠 for high)
UI: Celebrity photos have grayscale filter
UI: Age displayed for each celebrity
UI: Price displayed in £M format
UI: Clicking celebrity triggers search and displays celebrity card
seed_data_creation: Elderly celebrities already seeded: Michael Caine (93), Judi Dench (92), Morgan Freeman (89), Ian McKellen (87), Al Pacino (86), Paul McCartney (84), Robert De Niro (83)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Brown Bread Watch feature fully implemented and tested. API endpoint /api/brown-bread-watch returns elderly celebrities (60+) with risk levels based on age. Frontend displays in sidebar with skull icon, risk emojis, grayscale photos, ages, and prices. Click-to-search integration works correctly.

api_endpoint.returns: watch_list array with elderly celebrities aged 60+
